title: Intense AI use still rare among euro zone firms, ECB researchers find
description: Only a small fraction of euro zone firms use artificial intelligence intensely and they tend to be small, ​young, service-oriented companies, leaving plenty of room for diffusion, ‌a European Central Bank blog post said on Wednesday.

title: Your Home Could Help Solve AI’s Growing Power Demand
description: Tesla, Sunrun and Renew Home plan to tap solar panels, batteries, thermostats and other devices installed in millions of homes to meet the energy demands of artificial intelligence.

title: Could Brazil’s Next Big Soccer Star Be Scouted By AI?
description: Recruitment apps powered by artificial intelligence are gaining ground in Brazil, promising to even the playing field and find more soccer talent.
content:
Eager to impress, the young soccer players darted and dribbled around the purple cones laid out on the patchy grass. Their speed, control and footwork were all being carefully evaluated — but not by a veteran scout.

title: Medicare AI program made them suffer in pain. Now they want answers
description: For months, Medicare patients in Washington have struggled with delays and denials for medical treatments due to a new program that uses artificial intelligence to review care. title: FAA Bets $875 Million On AI To Reduce Flight Delays
description: The FAA awarded Air Space Intelligence an $875 million, 12-year contract to modernize America's air traffic system with artificial intelligence and predictive analytics.
content:

title: SK Hynix's $29 Billion U.S. Bet
description: South Korea's SK Hynix plans to raise 45.45 trillion won through listing American Depository Receipts in the U.S. This move aims to expand their investor base and boost production capacity for chips used in artificial intelligence. However, the final amount might change post bookbuilding.
content:
SK Hynix, a leading South Korean chipmaker, announced plans to raise 45.45 trillion won, equivalent to $29.43 billion, via the listing of American Depository Receipts in the United States.
